rules.title: Never restart while terminals are running
rules.description: Block supervised restarts when terminal shells are still open.

rules.title: Never restart while editor or local-server work is active
rules.description: Block supervised restarts when SessionGuard detects IDE or local-runtime workspace risk.

rules.title: Allow supervised restarts during a weekend window
rules.description: Only allow a supervised restart during the configured weekend window.

rules.title: Require approval when restart pressure is active
rules.description: Require a temporary approval window before a supervised restart when restart-pending pressure is already present.
